title: TruKingdoms
description: Have you ever wanted to be a Wizard? or a Knight? Or... why not, a Death Kinght? We have create a modpack that let you feel like you're in a fantasy story. Dungeons, weird monsters, spectacular landscapes, a misty enviroment that feel magical.
body: Have you ever wanted to be a Wizard? or a Knight? Or... why not, a Death Kinght? We have create a modpack that let you feel like you're in a fantasy story. Dungeons, weird monsters, spectacular landscapes, a misty enviroment that feel magical.
